name: H.A.R.D.
short_description: Are you able to overcome the obstacles in the 40 levels of H.A.R.D. ? Enter this insanely difficult game to figure it out.
detailed_description:
You are not ready !


Try the H.A.R.D. experience : the Horrible Adventure Really Difficult. In this "die & retry", you'll surpass yourself, playing a hard but fun game with different functionalities.

Learn how to get the most from the simple controls to cross the 40 levels : avoid red places and saws and reach the flag to complete a level. To succeed, you can move left and right and change the direction of the gravity.

Different functionalities :


When you become familiar with the controls, H.A.R.D. becomes insanely more difficult by adding features, which can be combined :



When you see a turned on pictogram, be careful ! Your controls may be reversed or the ground may be slippery.

Have fun playing H.A.R.D. ! And good luck...
